meta.title: about.ogatomo | Tomoya Ogawa
meta.description: This is the portfolio of Tomoya Ogawa, a 9th-grade programmer and blogger. It introduces his profile, background, projects, and skills.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a 14-year-old who loves programming and technology. I build web apps and write tech articles that beginners can follow.
about.p2Before: I started web development in first grade of elementary school, and in 2023 I founded
about.p3Before: Today I work on system development and write for
about.p4: I care about making expert topics clear for beginners — and I'll keep building useful things and sharing what I learn.

works.title: Works
works.lead: Apps, extensions, libraries — small tools that make life and learning a bit easier
works.pageDescription: Projects by Tomoya Ogawa — apps, extensions, libraries, and more.

events.title: Events, awards & certifications
events.lead: Contests, recognition, national exams, and more

cta.title: Get in touch
cta.body: For writing, commissions, or other inquiries, please use the contact form on my blog. I'll reply when I can.
